Index.title: Welcome to FastDevTools
Index.description: A collection of essential tools for developers, all running directly in your browser without sending data to any server.
Index.noResults: No tools found matching your criteria.

color-palette.name: Color Palette
color-palette.whatIsIt: A color palette is a range of colors used in visual design. This tool helps you find harmonious color combinations based on a base color using mathematical color theory.
color-palette.howToUse: Select a base color using the color picker or enter a HEX/RGB code. The tool will automatically generate complementary, analogous, and monochromatic variations.

jwt.name: JWT Secret
jwt.whatIsIt: JSON Web Tokens (JWT) require a strong secret key for signing to prevent unauthorized access. This tool generates high-entropy strings suitable for HS256, HS384, or HS512 algorithms.
jwt.howToUse: Select the desired security level or length, and click 'Generate'. You should store this secret securely in your environment variables.

uuid.name: UUID/GUID
uuid.whatIsIt: A Universally Unique Identifier (UUID) is a 128-bit number used to identify information in computer systems. It is designed to be unique across space and time.
uuid.howToUse: Choose the version (v4 for random, v5 for namespace-based), specify the quantity, and click generate. You can then copy the results to your clipboard.

gradients.name: CSS Gradients
gradients.description: Create backgrounds with linear and radial gradients.

shadows.name: CSS Shadows
shadows.description: Design shadows and copy them as CSS.

grid.name: CSS Grid
grid.description: Generate layouts with CSS Grid visually.

json.name: JSON Formatter
json.whatIsIt: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data-interchange format. This tool helps you make JSON data readable (pretty-print) or compact (minify) while ensuring it's valid.
json.howToUse: Paste your JSON code into the editor. Use the 'Format' button to beautify it, 'Minify' to reduce its size, or 'Validate' to check for syntax errors.

css-minifier.name: CSS Minifier
css-minifier.description: Reduce the size of your CSS code.

units.name: Unit Converter
units.description: Convert between px, rem, and em.

word-counter.name: Word Counter
word-counter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and reading time.

character-counter.name: Character Counter
character-counter.description: Count characters with and without spaces.

slug-generator.name: Slug Generator
slug-generator.description: Generate SEO-friendly URL slugs from any text.
slug-generator.whatIsIt: A slug is the part of a URL which identifies a particular page on a website in a human-readable format. It is essential for SEO as it helps search engines understand the content of the page.
slug-generator.howToUse: Enter your article title or any text in the input field. The tool will automatically convert it to a lowercase, hyphen-separated string. You can customize the separator and remove common stop words.

remove-duplicate-lines.name: Remove Duplicates
remove-duplicate-lines.description: Easily remove duplicate lines from a text.

Favorites.title: My Favorites
Favorites.description: Your most used tools, always at hand.
Favorites.emptyState: You don't have any favorite tools yet.
Favorites.emptyStateDesc: Click the star icon on any tool to add it to your favorites.

Legal.privacyContent: We collect information to provide better services to all our users. We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We use localStorage to save your preferences and favorite tools locally on your device.
Legal.termsContent: By using FastDevTools, you agree to these terms. The tools are provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind. You are responsible for how you use the generated data.
Legal.cookiesContent: We use cookies and similar technologies (like localStorage) to store your preferences and favorites. We also use third-party cookies (like Google Analytics and Google AdSense) to analyze traffic and show personalized ads.

Cookies.bannerText: We use our own and third-party cookies to improve your experience and our services, as well as to show you personalized advertising based on your browsing habits.

About.title: About Us
About.welcome: Welcome to FastDevTools, your comprehensive destination for web development utilities.
About.missionDesc: To provide developers with high-quality, privacy-focused tools that run entirely in the browser. No data is ever sent to our servers.
About.fastDesc: Tools execute in your browser using JavaScript, ensuring maximum speed.
About.offlineDesc: Many tools can work even when you are not connected to the internet.
About.openSourceDesc: We believe in transparency and developer-centric design.
About.responsiveDesc: Use our tools on your desktop, tablet, or smartphone.
About.techDesc: Built with the latest web technologies including Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript to ensure a smooth and secure experience.
